title: MX Warden
description: A simple resource pack that replaces the Warden with MX from Mario '85
body:
Gotta love a nice creepypasta reference! While im working on my mario themed resource pack, heres a simple lil thing for ya. Its MX from Mario '85 replacing the Warden! 

I was gonna have this as an easter egg where you rename the warden to MX but i didnt feel like figuring that out so i guess this is the second best thing :)

Enjoy, and look forward to a release for my texture pack fairly soon

If you have any issues with the pack, you can DM [here](https://bsky.app/profile/thegayestvivian.bsky.social)

I do not own the MX character or anything Mario '85 related. Credit goes to [RazzDazzleDoo](https://bsky.app/profile/razzdazzledoo.nekoweb.org)
